endpoint_address.name: Ollama API Endpoint
endpoint_address.description: The URL of your Ollama server (e.g., http://192.168.1.50:11434/api/generate).

auth_token.name: Authorization Token
auth_token.description: The Bearer token required for API access.

max_concurrent_requests.name: Max Concurrent Requests
max_concurrent_requests.description: How many AI generations can run at the same time.

timeout.name: Request Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds to wait for a response from Ollama.

database_file.name: Database Path
database_file.description: Location of the SQLite buffer database.

log_level.name: Log Level
log_level.description: Detail level of logs (info, debug, warning).

endpoints.name: Buffer Endpoints
endpoints.description: Configure your specific AI reply buffers here.
